title: Tangy Silky Indulgent Venezuelan Barramundi Stir-fry
description: This delicious and indulgent Venezuelan dish features tangy flavors with a silky texture, perfect for a quick and easy dinner or snack.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 450°F (230°C). Season the barramundi fillets with salt and pepper.
In a small saucepan, heat tomato sauce until hot. Reduce to simmer for about 10 minutes.
Add lime juice, lemon zest, diced onions, garlic, and red bell peppers into the tomato sauce mixture. Stir well and let it cook on medium-high heat until the vegetables are soft.
Once the vegetables are cooked, stir in the barramundi fillets. Cook for about 5-7 minutes or until just done.
Serve with a lime wedge to squeeze over each serving.
